expectations.text: Does NOT run a full board meeting immediately — no agent turn headers appear
expectations.evidence: No ## Agent headers appear. Output is 'Board Meeting — awaiting clarification' followed by a single question.
'what specifically is "the thing we discussed"? Give me the topic, decision, or question you want the board to weigh in on'

expectations.text: Does not ask multiple questions or run an extended interview
expectations.evidence: Single question only, commits to running the meeting immediately once answered.
